expectations.text: before_after_structure: Is there a clear Before/After visual structure?
expectations.evidence: 3-column grid with `.col-panel.before` (red border), center arrow column, and `.col-panel.after` (green border)

expectations.text: all_three_kpis: Are 処理時間, エラー率, 月間コスト all present?
expectations.evidence: 処理時間 (4時間→20分), エラー率 (12%→1.5%), 月間コスト (80万円→35万円) in both before/after panels and stat-bar footer

expectations.text: big_number_emphasis: Are numbers displayed in large/bold/colored text?
expectations.evidence: `.kpi-row-value { font-size: 52px; font-weight: 900 }` with red (#F87171) for before and green (#10B981) for after
`<button class='export-btn' onclick='exportPPTX()'>PPTX に書き出す</button>`; html2canvas + pptxgenjs@3.12.0 loaded; full `exportPPTX()` async function implemented
